product_details_tab_data.Title: Mini U Sparkling Strawberry Bubble Bath for Babies & Kids - Pink
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Beauty › Bath & Body › Bath Additives › Bubble Bath
product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: Aqua, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Lauryl Glucoside, Glycerin, Sodium Cocoamphoacetate, Sodium Lauroyl Methyl Isethionate, Sodium Chloride, Polysorbate 20, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Gluconate, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice Powder, CI 17200.
product_details_tab_data.Special Ingredients: Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice Powder, CI 17200
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If product gets in the eyes, rinse thoroughly with water. Rinse from bath immediately following use. Avoid contact with porous surfaces such as carpet. May stain clothes.
